spacing_and_layout.strategy: Slot-Based Parallel Streams for desktop (Admin left slot, Chat right slot). Tab toggle for mobile.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous padding: p-6 to p-8 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.chat_simulator_layout: Fixed right pane on desktop, 400px width. Left pane flex-1 for admin dashboard.

components.buttons: Flat colors, no heavy shadows. text_primary on hover: active text inversion. Rounded-md.
components.cards: Cardless or 1px subtle border (#E3E0D8) with flat surface (#FFFFFF). No drop shadows.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized to Organic & Earthy borders. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary_accent.
components.chat_bubbles: Clear distinction. Bot: White with 1px border. User: Warm Sand color (#D6C9B3).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle -translate-y-px and opacity shift. Explicit hover text colors.
motion_and_interactions.chat_entry: Staggered slide-up animation for incoming chat messages.

icons.usage: Use sparingly. 20px (w-5 h-5) for standard icons.

beer_product.description: Craft beer bottle for demo product

bot_avatar.description: Friendly bartender portrait for bot avatar

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Split-Screen layout on desktop: Left side is the Admin Dashboard (Products/Orders), Right side is the Chat Simulator.
On mobile, use a toggle/tab at the top to switch between Admin and Chat views.
Use Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) colors. Avoid default blue or teal WhatsApp colors.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Use Shadcn UI for tables, tabs, inputs, and customize them to fit the flat, earthy aesthetic (no heavy box-shadows).
In the Chat Simulator, build message bubbles that mimic WhatsApp structure (tail, timestamp, tick marks) but styled in the Organic theme.
Use the provided image_urls for the demo products and the bot avatar. Do not use placeholders.
Fonts: Use Work Sans for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Do not use Inter.
